description: Tracks what an institutional manager bought and sold each quarter by diffing their 13F filings, e.g. what did Buffett buy this quarter.

Scores the health of an accounts receivable book from its aging profile, returning a weighted score and grade.

One guardrail call an agent makes before trusting untrusted inbound text — a scraped webpage, an email, a tool result, or a user message.

Agent run review / trace cost evals / post-run analysis / agent debugging in one call: hand it a raw agent execution trace and get a readable brief of what happened, a cost estimate for the run, and a first draft of regression eval cases to catch the same failure next time.
Turns a raw agent execution trace into a readable agent trace summary: an ordered step-by-step account of what the agent did, where it broke, and why.
Detect AI-generated writing with a calibrated probability score.

AI-generated image detector: send an image URL and get back a calibrated probability that the image is AI-generated or synthetic, plus the vision signals behind the score — anatomical artifacts (hands, teeth, eyes), garbled pseudo-text, over-smooth texture, lighting/shadow inconsistency, background incoherence, and an over-stylized 'AI look'.
Rewrite AI-generated text so it reads like a person wrote it.
Returns current air quality readings and AQI category for any latitude/longitude, with optional hourly forecast rows for the next 1-72 hours.

Scores a blended finance structure on how efficiently concessional capital mobilizes private money, returning a 0-100 structure score.

Pull wage, employment level, and growth data straight from the Bureau of Labor Statistics Public Data API by series ID, covering formats like OEWS occupational wages (OEUM...), local-area unemployment (LAU...), and CES employment series.
